# Eco Villa Bali

> Two eco-conscious family villas for sale within an 8-minute walk of Green School Bali, in Eco Village Sibang, Sibang Kaja, Bali. Sold directly by the owner, a former resident and former Green School parent.

## Properties

- [Villa Sungai](https://ecovillabali.com/villa-sungai): Sustainable 3-bedroom eco villa with a riverside setting, natural pool, and 800 sqm of land.
- [Villa Kailash](https://ecovillabali.com/villa-kailash): Spacious 3/4-bedroom eco villa with rice field views, a natural pool, yoga studio, and 950 sqm of land.
- [Villas Near Green School Bali](https://ecovillabali.com/green-school-villa-bali): Overview of both villas and why Eco Village Sibang is a rare option within walking distance of Green School Bali.

## Location & Lifestyle

- [Location](https://ecovillabali.com/location): Eco Village Sibang's position relative to Green School Bali, Ubud, the Ayung River, and Ngurah Rai Airport.
- [Lifestyle](https://ecovillabali.com/lifestyle): Daily life in Eco Village Sibang: organic living, cultural immersion, and the international Green School community.

## About

- [About the Owners](https://ecovillabali.com/about): Oscar and Iris, former residents of Eco Village Sibang and former Green School Bali parents, sell their two eco villas directly without an agency.

## Buyer Information

- [FAQ](https://ecovillabali.com/faq): Answers to common questions about buying property in Bali as a foreigner, living near Green School, and the Eco Village Sibang community.
- [Inquire Now](https://ecovillabali.com/inquire-now): Contact form and WhatsApp to request availability, details, or schedule a viewing.

## Blog

- [Blog](https://ecovillabali.com/blog): Guides and insights on relocating to Bali for Green School and sustainable living in Eco Village Sibang.
- [Where to Live Near Green School Bali](https://ecovillabali.com/blog/where-to-live-near-green-school-bali): How Eco Village Sibang, Sayan, Ubud, and Canggu compare for Green School families on commute, lifestyle, and the daily school run.
- [Buying Property in Bali as a Foreigner](https://ecovillabali.com/blog/buying-property-bali-foreigner): The legal routes for foreigners (leasehold, Hak Pakai, PT PMA), why nominee arrangements are risky, and a due-diligence checklist before buying a villa near Green School.
- [Relocating to Bali for Green School](https://ecovillabali.com/blog/complete-guide-relocating-bali-expat-family): Where Green School families live (Eco Village Sibang, Sayan, Ubud, Canggu), typical rental and purchase costs, and how to choose a neighborhood.
- [Sustainable Living Near Green School Bali](https://ecovillabali.com/blog/sustainable-living-bali-eco-village-sibang): What sustainable living looks like day to day in Eco Village Sibang: walkability, community, and natural building materials.
